case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC VS. VLADIMIR VOLOSNIKOV et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC AS TO DEFENDANT VOLOSNIKOV, VLADIMIR DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-09-2009
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-28-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC SERVED AUG-27-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VOLOSNIKOV, VLADIMIR
DECLARATION PER CCP 395 (B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT VOLOSNIKOV, VLADIMIR
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $249.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT VOLOSNIKOV, VLADIMIR
DECLARATION UNDER CCP 1033; INTEREST CALCULATION; ATTORNEY FEE; AND WAIVER OF EXCESS PRINCIPAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC
DECLARATION RE REDUCTION IN FILING FEES PER B/P CODE 6322.1C FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VOLOSNIKOV, VLADIMIR $3,567.00 PRINCIPAL, $155.61 INTEREST, $249.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,972.11, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF OCT-28-2009, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
